features.name: Project setup and baseline verification
features.description: Install dependencies, verify tests/build, and keep the Vite React app restartable from a clean checkout.
features.evidence: npm test and npm run build passed before harness creation; init.sh runs the same checks.

features.name: Taipei 1999 data ingestion and privacy-preserving UI
features.description: Convert local/fetched Open1999 data, publish sanitized JSON, and render district, hotspot, list, and dashboard views.
features.evidence: public/data contains sanitized generated JSON; browser verification confirmed map/district circles render without console errors.

features.name: GitHub Pages deployment workflow
features.description: Build, test, upload, and deploy the static Vite app through GitHub Pages on main pushes and manual dispatches.
features.evidence: .github/workflows/deploy-pages.yml added; npm run build:pages passed and dist/index.html uses /taipei-1999-map/ asset paths.

features.name: Agent harness and handoff maintenance
features.description: Keep AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, progress.md, init.sh, and session-handoff.md current for future coding-agent sessions.
features.evidence: Harness validation scored 100/100; ./init.sh passed npm test and npm run build.

features.name: Review and cleanup pass
features.description: Run code review and anti-slop cleanup on the deployment/data changes while preserving behavior.
features.evidence: Invalid time parsing, duplicate case ID publishing, and empty top-group display were fixed; 12 tests passed.

features.name: Taipei streetlight repair data module
features.description: Fetch, convert, summarize, and display Taipei streetlight repair records as a privacy-preserving district-level service data module.
features.evidence: Fetched official streetlight CSV resources, converted 65,022 deduplicated records, added React/Leaflet module, and verified with npm test, npm run build, npm run build:pages, and static browser smoke testing.
